duplicates.title: Daily Surge In Google Trends For Urgent Hvac Repair Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Industrial Sector

duplicate_of.matched_title: daily spike in google trends for emergency vehicle repair signals consumer stress lifting industrial sector

idea.title: Daily Surge In Google Trends For Urgent Hvac Repair Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Industrial Sector
idea.thesis: Sharp daily increases in urgent HVAC repair searches indicate consumer stress leading to increased industrial repair activity. HVAC repair demand drives industrial sector revenues in maintenance and construction-related industries.
idea.signal_logic: Enter long when daily search interest surges 35% above 10-day average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long when daily search interest surges 35% above 10-day average Exit: Exit after 7 days or when interest falls below average
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends daily search interest via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: HVAC repair searches spike with sudden weather changes and consumer budget stress.

schema.behavior: Sharp daily increases in urgent HVAC repair searches indicate consumer stress leading to increased industrial repair activity.

market_impact.rationale: HVAC repair demand drives industrial sector revenues in maintenance and construction-related industries.

trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 days or when interest falls below average
